description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian with a confident stance, arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She has a short, modern hairstyle and wears a fitted, short-sleeve top paired with high-waisted shorts. Her footwear consists of casual low-top shoes, and her overall build is athletic and proportional. The facial features are expressive, with a focused gaze and defined eyebrows. The clothing fits snugly, accentuating the figure, and the shoes appear practical for walking in urban environments. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the surface finish of the clothing and skin is matte, with minimal gloss.
description: A stylized adult woman in a T-pose, wearing a fitted short-sleeve top, high-waisted shorts, and casual shoes, with a short modern hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, fitted top, shorts, and shoes, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, chest, and the side seam of the shorts and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, top, shorts, and shoes, with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and side details of the clothing and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve fitted top and high-waisted shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
